Interface IBufferConstructionProperties2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control whether buffering is done on a plane or on an ellipsoid.

[Guid("3B4CA07A-7A46-4766-86DC-4B4F81035C88")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBufferConstructionProperties2 : IBufferConstructionProperties

UseGeodesicBuffering

Specifies whether planar or geodesic (on an ellipsoid) buffering is done.

bool UseGeodesicBuffering { get; set; }
